message.content:
Migrate 10 pages in `/Users/admin/it-asset/app/` to use shared UI components. The shared components are:

- `@/components/ui/input` → `<Input>` (replaces native `<input>`)
- `@/components/ui/textarea` → `<Textarea>` (replaces native `<textarea>`)
- `@/components/ui/skeleton` → `<Skeleton className="h-X w-Y" />` (replaces `<div className="h-X animate-pulse rounded bg-muted">`)
- `@/components/ui/card` → `<Card>`, `<CardHeader>`, `<CardTitle>`, `<CardContent>` (replaces `<div className="rounded-lg border p-4">`)
- `@/components/ui/dialog` → `<Dialog>`, `<DialogTrigger>`, `<DialogContent>`, `<DialogHeader>`, `<DialogTitle>`, `<DialogFooter>` (replaces `<div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">`)
- `@/components/empty-state` → `<EmptyState icon={...} title="..." description="..." action={...} />` (replaces `<div className="rounded-lg border border-dashed p-12 text-center">`)
- `@/components/ticket-status-badge` → `<TicketStatusBadge status={t.status} />` (replaces inline statusBadge functions for ticket status)
- `@/components/asset-status-badge` → `<AssetStatusBadge status={a.status} />` (replaces inline statusBadge functions for asset status)
- `@/components/page-header` → `<PageHeader title="..." description="..." />` (replaces manual `<h1>` + description)
- `@/components/ui/select` → `<Select>`, `<SelectTrigger>`, `<SelectValue>`, `<SelectContent>`, `<SelectItem>` (replaces native `<select>`)

## IMPORTANT RULES

1. Read each page file BEFORE editing
2. Replace native `<input>` with `<Input>` component — the Input component handles all styling, do NOT add custom class strings to Input
3. Replace native `<textarea>` with `<Textarea>` — same, no custom class strings
4. For Dialog: the reject/confirmation dialogs need to be restructured. Read `components/ui/dialog.tsx` first to understand the API. Use `<Dialog open={...} onOpenChange={...}>` pattern.
5. For EmptyState: use `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="..." />` pattern. Import `Inbox` from `lucide-react`.
6. For status badges: replace the ENTIRE inline `statusBadge()` function definition AND all its usages with the shared component import.
7. Add `<PageHeader>` at the top of each page replacing the manual `<h1>`.
8. The page's `max-w-*` should follow this convention:
   - Content pages (dept-board): `max-w-4xl`
   - List pages (approvals, it/users): `max-w-4xl`
   - Dashboard pages (it/home): `max-w-5xl`
   - Wide list pages (it/tickets, it/assets, it/models, it/inventory, it/audit): `max-w-5xl`
   - Detail pages (it/assets/[id]): `max-w-3xl`
9. After ALL edits, run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript. Fix any errors.

## Files to migrate

### 1. `app/approvals/page.tsx`
- Replace inline `statusBadge()` for ticket status with `<TicketStatusBadge>`
- Replace inline reject dialog with `<Dialog>` component
- Replace inline skeleton loading with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无待审批工单" />`
- Add `<PageHeader title="待审批" description="处理部门员工的工单申请" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-4xl`

### 2. `app/dept-board/page.tsx`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无数据" />`
- Replace stat cards with `<Card>`
- Add `<PageHeader title="部门看板" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-4xl`

### 3. `app/it/home/page.tsx`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace stat cards with `<Card>`
- Add `<PageHeader title="IT 管理控制台" description="资产管理、工单处理、入库盘点" />`
- Fix max-w: change to `max-w-5xl`

### 4. `app/it/tickets/page.tsx`
- Replace inline `statusBadge()` with `<TicketStatusBadge>`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace native `<select>` with `<Select>`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无工单" />`
- Add `<PageHeader title="工单管理" description="查看和处理所有工单" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-5xl`

### 5. `app/it/assets/page.tsx`
- Replace inline `statusBadge()` with `<AssetStatusBadge>`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace native `<input>` and `<select>` with `<Input>` and `<Select>`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无资产" />`
- Add `<PageHeader title="资产管理" description="查看和管理所有资产实例" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-5xl`

### 6. `app/it/assets/[id]/page.tsx`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace inline `ActionDialog` (scrap/lost dialogs) with `<Dialog>` component
- Replace the status badge span with `<AssetStatusBadge>`
- Replace detail cards with `<Card>` sub-components
- Add `<PageHeader title="资产详情" />`
- Fix max-w: change to `max-w-3xl`

### 7. `app/it/models/page.tsx`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无型号数据" />`
- Add `<PageHeader title="型号管理" description="管理设备型号和规格" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-4xl`

### 8. `app/it/inventory/page.tsx`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无盘点会话" description="盘点功能即将上线" />`
- Replace stat cards with `<Card>`
- Add `<PageHeader title="资产盘点" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-4xl`

### 9. `app/it/users/page.tsx`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无用户数据" />`
- Add `<PageHeader title="用户管理" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-3xl`

### 10. `app/it/audit/page.tsx`
- Replace native `<select>` with `<Select>`
- Replace inline skeleton with `<Skeleton>`
- Replace empty state with `<EmptyState icon={Inbox} title="暂无审计日志" description="操作记录将显示在此处" />`
- Add `<PageHeader title="审计日志" description="系统操作记录追溯" />`
- Fix max-w: keep `max-w-5xl`

## Key patterns

For Dialog:
```tsx
<Dialog open={dialogOpen} onOpenChange={setDialogOpen}>
  <DialogContent showCloseButton>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>标题</DialogTitle>
    </DialogHeader>
    <!-- content -->
    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDialogOpen(false)}>取消</Button>
      <Button onClick={handleAction}>确认</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

For Select:
```tsx
<Select value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <SelectTrigger>
    <SelectValue placeholder="请选择..." />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="option1">选项1</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

IMPORTANT: Read each file before editing. After ALL edits, run `npx tsc --noEmit` and fix any TypeScript errors.

- miniprogram-development: WeChat Mini Program development skill for building, debugging, previewing, testing, publishing, and optimizing mini program projects. This skill should be used when users ask to create, develop, modify, debug, preview, test, deploy, publish, launch, review, or optimize WeChat Mini Programs, mini program pages, components, `tabBar`, routing, navigation, icon assets, project structure, project configuration, `project.config.json`, `appid` setup, device preview, real-device validation, WeChat Developer Tools workflows, `miniprogram-ci` preview/upload flows, or mini program release processes. It should also be used when users explicitly mention CloudBase, `wx.cloud`, Tencent CloudBase, 腾讯云开发, or 云开发 in a mini program project.
- ui-ux-pro-max: UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile. Includes 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types across 10 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and HTML/CSS). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, and check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, and mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, and chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, and flat design. Topics: color systems, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, interaction states, shadow, and gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

2. **解意图**: The Emperor wants to standardize the codebase by replacing inline UI patterns with shared components, improving consistency and maintainability.
3. **断风险**: 
   - Many files to edit - risk of missing something
   - TypeScript compilation must pass after edits
   - Need to read each file first before editing
   - Need to read shared components to understand their API
4. **定方案**: This is a large task spanning many files. I'll dispatch the work to my ministers. Since the tasks involve reading many files and making many edits, I should break this into parallel workstreams where possible.

But wait - per the 首辅 rules, I don't write code myself. I dispatch to ministers. However, this is a very mechanical task of read-then-edit across 10 files. Let me think about the best approach.

**1. `app/approvals/page.tsx`** - Changes needed:
- Replace inline `statusBadge()` with `<TicketStatusBadge>` import

- Replace inline skeleton loading with `<Skeleton>`

All 10 files are written. Now I need to run `npx tsc --noEmit` to check for TypeScript errors. Let me also update the todo list.

But first, I should think about potential issues:
1. The `AssetStatusBadge` status prop expects `AssetInstanceStatus` type, but in the assets page and detail page, the status comes from the API as `string`. I used a cast `as import("@/components/asset-status-badge").AssetInstanceStatus` which should work but might not be ideal.
2. The `EmptyState` component's `icon` prop expects `LucideIcon` type, and `Inbox` from lucide-react should be compatible.
3. The `Dialog` open/onOpenChange pattern should be compatible with the base-ui dialog.
4. The `Select` value/onValueChange pattern should work.
5. In app/it/assets/[id]/page.tsx, the PageHeader has both title in PageHeader AND an sn subtitle below it, which changes the layout slightly. The title is now within PageHeader which renders as an h1, and then there's the sn paragraph below it.

Let me run tsc to check.

content.text:
---

陛下，10 页迁移已毕，`npx tsc --noEmit` 零错通过。以下是各文件的变更概览：

| # | 文件 | 主要变更 |
|---|------|----------|
| 1 | `app/approvals/page.tsx` | 替换 `statusBadge` 为 `<TicketStatusBadge>`；驳回弹窗改用 `<Dialog>` + `<Textarea>`；skeleton 改用 `<Skeleton>`；空态改用 `<EmptyState icon={Inbox}>`；标题改用 `<PageHeader>` |
| 2 | `app/dept-board/page.tsx` | 骨架→`<Skeleton>`；统计卡片→`<Card>`+`<CardContent>`；空态→`<EmptyState>`；标题→`<PageHeader>` |
| 3 | `app/it/home/page.tsx` | 骨架→`<Skeleton>`；统计卡片→`<Card>`+`<CardContent>`；`max-w-4xl`→`max-w-5xl`；标题→`<PageHeader>` |
| 4 | `app/it/tickets/page.tsx` | `statusBadge`→`<TicketStatusBadge>`；原生 `<select>`→`<Select>` 全套；骨架→`<Skeleton>`；空态→`<EmptyState>`；标题→`<PageHeader>` |
| 5 | `app/it/assets/page.tsx` | `statusBadge`→`<AssetStatusBadge>`；原生 `<input>`→`<Input>`（无自定义 class）；原生 `<select>`×2→`<Select>`；骨架/空态/标题同上 |
| 6 | `app/it/assets/[id]/page.tsx` | 内联 `ActionDialog`→`<Dialog>`（报废/丢失双弹窗）；`<textarea>`→`<Textarea>`；状态标签→`<AssetStatusBadge>`；详情卡片→`<Card>`+`<CardContent>`；标题→`<PageHeader>` |
| 7 | `app/it/models/page.tsx` | 骨架→`<Skeleton>`；空态→`<EmptyState>`；标题→`<PageHeader>` |
| 8 | `app/it/inventory/page.tsx` | 空态×2→`<EmptyState>`；统计卡片→`<Card>`+`<CardContent>`；标题→`<PageHeader>` |
| 9 | `app/it/users/page.tsx` | 骨架→`<Skeleton>`；空态→`<EmptyState>`；标题→`<PageHeader>` |
| 10 | `app/it/audit/page.tsx` | 原生 `<select>`×2→`<Select>`（新增 `actionFilter`/`targetFilter` 状态控制）；骨架→`<Skeleton>`；空态→`<EmptyState>`；标题→`<PageHeader>`；`max-w-4xl`→`max-w-5xl` |

**关键决策：**
- `Input` 和 `Textarea` 组件自带完整样式，按规则未添加自定义 class 字符串
- `AssetStatusBadge` 的 `status` prop 类型为 `AssetInstanceStatus` 联合类型，对 API 返回的 `string` 做了显式 cast
- 审计页面原本 `<select>` 无状态绑定（纯静态），改为 `<Select>` 后新增了 `actionFilter`/`targetFilter` 两条 state 以配合 `value`+`onValueChange` API
- `EmptyState` 和 `Card` 是纯服务端组件（无 `"use client"`），在 client page 中直接导入可用
